sourceOnlyReplayV1.scope: Executed replay for one choreography reference, one chosen song, two generated creator takes, three protected captions, deterministic plan/render linkage, and pre-evaluation freeze. Canonical component artifacts pass runtime validators; the aggregate output envelope is not yet emitted.

heldOutHumanChoreography.scope: Blind human choreography selection, creative quality, caption safety, and held-out preference remain unproven.

allow: run, trace, asset, phrase, candidate, cue, evidence, tool, and artifact IDs
song, source, reference, and output ranges
scores, confidence, status, and validation verdicts
deny: raw frames, audio, thumbnails, or protected lyric text
media locators, signed references, local paths, URLs, or filenames
hidden evaluation target identities, bytes, hashes, or derivatives before freeze

rules: asset IDs must be unique and hashes must bind one role only
exactly one reference and one song plus at least one take are required
the reference is analysis-only and every take is a render source
no evaluation-target role or undeclared asset may enter generation
the song excerpt must have positive duration and remain inside the song
analysis asset identities and song excerpt must equal admitted input bindings
phrase indices and IDs must be unique and strictly ordered
phrase song ranges must be positive, non-overlapping, gapless, and exactly cover the chosen excerpt
phrase reference ranges and beat ranges must be positive and ordered
every phrase must reference movement and tool evidence
every admitted take must have exactly one alignment
alignment anchors must be strictly increasing in song, reference, and take time
candidate rows and analysis phrases must have identical phrase-ID sets
candidate and selected IDs must be unique within their declared scope
candidate take IDs must belong to admitted takes
candidate source ranges must be positive and inside probed take durations
candidate song ranges must equal the owning phrase song range
scores must be finite in the inclusive range zero through one
rejected candidates must carry rejection codes
every selected candidate must exist in its row and be admissible
caption and safe-area coordinates must be finite and normalized
xMin must be less than xMax and yMin must be less than yMax
every cue must remain within the declared safe area and chosen song excerpt
every cue must reference an existing protected lyric segment, phrase, and grounding result
face overlap must be zero, body-overlap p95 at most 0.02, and maximum body overlap at most 0.05
non-valid grounding requires explicit manual placement before completion
attention intent records target, eye travel, motion relationship, novelty, saliency competition, and evidence without claiming an unconfirmed creator rule
protected lyric strings must not appear in traces or public receipts
EditPlan must validate as nodevideo.edit-plan.v1
primary video must be contiguous and cover the exact chosen-song output duration
video lineage may contain selected take assets only and must exclude the choreography reference
camera/source audio must be muted structurally
authorized audio output must use the exact chosen song asset and excerpt
every source clip must link to its selected phrase candidate
caption overlay timing and normalized boxes must equal the validated caption layout
input bindings must equal reference, song, takes, and optional protected lyrics admitted at generation
frozen hashes must match the exact stored analysis, candidates, caption layout, plan, render, and read-log bytes
read-log asset IDs must be unique, hash-bound, and limited to admitted generation inputs
networkAccess must be false and targetAccess must remain denied
hidden target, parent volume, and evaluator credential must be absent
targetUnsealedAt must be null and freeze must be sealed before evaluation
the receipt artifact hash is verified externally and is not a recursive self-hash

implementation.scope: Resolve and probe admitted reference, song, takes, and protected lyric assets inside the media worker.
Analyze the exact chosen song excerpt into beats, downbeats, onsets, energy, and phrase boundaries.
Extract motion, pose, subject visibility, framing, and quality evidence from the reference and every take.
Call text-query-only LocateRequest by trace and asset ID; visual-prompt assets are unsupported.
Map reference and every take to a shared chosen-song clock using ordered piecewise anchors.
Create evidence-linked, duration-valid take candidates and decomposed scores for every choreography phrase.
Align protected lyric segments and score reusable safe-area boxes for body clearance, active-wrist affinity, spatial novelty, eye travel, and saliency competition.
Select one admissible candidate per phrase under timing, movement, continuity, take-switch, framing, and quality costs.
Validate canonical EditPlan structure plus phrase/candidate lineage, chosen-song routing, muted source audio, and caption-layout equality.
Render the validated plan through the fixed deterministic renderer; no model-generated FFmpeg or executable fragment.
Hash-bind inputs and generation artifacts, verify the source-only read log, and seal before a separate evaluator can receive a hidden target.
Run every declared cross-artifact validator and permit completed status only after a passing source-only freeze.
